case_title: SHANG BIN TAN VS. COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, SHANG BIN AS TO DEFENDANT SACOR FINANCIAL, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, SHANG BIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC SACOR FINANCIAL, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
